app.name: Cougny
app.tagline: Meet someone new, face to face.

home.title: Talk to a stranger
home.subtitle: One click and you're matched with a random person for a live video chat.
home.guidelines: Be kind. No nudity, harassment, or anyone under 18. You can skip or report anytime.
home.cameraNote: We'll ask for camera and microphone access to connect you.

call.searching: Looking for someone to talk to…
call.permissionDenied: Camera and microphone access is required to start a call.
call.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

report.title: Report this person
report.thanks: Thanks — our team will review this.
